title: Peruvian-Style Roasted Duck with Relleno
description: A fusion dish featuring roasted duck, Peruvian spices, and a flavorful relleno filling.
instructions: Rinse the duck and pat dry with paper towels.
In a small bowl, mix together lime juice, aji amarillo peppers, garlic, cumin, coriander, salt, and black pepper.
Rub the spice mixture all over the duck, making sure to get some under the skin as well.
Stuff the relleno filling into the duck's cavity.
Drizzle olive oil over the duck and place it in a roasting pan.
Roast the duck in the preheated oven for 45-50 minutes, or until the skin is crispy and golden brown.
Let the duck rest for 10-15 minutes before carving and serving.
